body.label: Input Output Engineering Core Development Proposal (5of6)
description: The proposed adjustments specify new completion dates for each
of the milestones MS14.6 & MS14.9 of Plutus Core Project. These
revisions are a direct and necessary consequence of unforeseen
reason: This Change Request Form is being submitted to align the
referenced milestones and completion dates with the revised
technical realities identified during the current phase of the
project. The need for this revision is based on new and

during the execution of the Scope of Work (“SOW”).
The primary
drivers for these changes across all the listed initiatives are:
previously unknown or undiscoverable technical requirements
necessitating additional development work to meet deliverables

and acceptance criteria.
- Infrastructure constraint and/or
dependency delay specifically new Ledger era.
